summary: Iteration 62: Text Testimonials Font Styling Feature - FULLY WORKING. All backend API tests passed (10/10). All frontend UI features verified: Admin Text Quotes tab with font controls (Quote Font, Quote Size, Quote Color, Italic toggle, Author Font, Author Size, Author Color), live preview, Save All button, and homepage TextTestimonialsStrip component correctly fetching and applying styles from backend.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly includes text_testimonials_style in SiteSettingsUpdate model (line 597)
Backend PUT /api/settings correctly saves text_testimonials_style via generic dict filter on line 42
Frontend TextTestimonialsStrip.jsx correctly fetches settings from /api/settings and applies styles
Admin TextTestimonialsTab.jsx correctly displays all font controls and saves via PUT /api/settings
Live preview in admin correctly reflects selected styles
Auto-rotation of testimonials works with smooth fade transitions (5.5 second interval)
Navigation dots work correctly for manual testimonial selection
seed_data_creation: 4 testimonials already exist in database with various authors (Priya S., Sarah M., Ananya R., Preeti Jagtiani)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Text testimonials feature fully working. Key data-testids: text-testimonials-section (homepage section), text-testimonial-quote, text-testimonial-author, testimonial-dots (navigation), quote-font-select, author-font-select, quote-color, quote-style-preview, quote-style-controls, save-text-testimonials. Style fields: quote_font, quote_size, quote_color, quote_italic, author_font, author_size, author_color.

UI: Quote styles applied from settings
UI: Author styles applied from settings

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Font changes in admin weren't reflecting on frontend
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_1: text_testimonials_style was missing from SiteSettingsUpdate model, so PUT endpoint dropped the style data
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_2: TextTestimonialsStrip.jsx had hardcoded styles and never fetched settings from backend
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied_1: Added text_testimonials_style: Optional[Dict] = None to SiteSettingsUpdate model (line 597)
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied_2: Rewrote TextTestimonialsStrip.jsx to fetch /api/settings and apply text_testimonials_style
bug_fix_verification.verification: PASS - Style changes in admin now correctly persist to backend and display on frontend
